metadata.host_name: Anthony Fasano, PE, AEC PM, F. ASCE Engineering Management Institute Author of Engineer Your Own Success
metadata.videotitle: Top Project Management Leadership Strategies Every AEC Professional Needs
metadata.videodesc: In this episode, Jenna Anderson, PE, PMP, Senior Consultant and Group Lead at Parametrix, shares how true professionalism—through trust, accountability, and intentional leadership—can transform project teams. From building alignment systems and mentoring new PMs to preventing burnout while managing multiple projects, Jenna offers actionable advice to help leaders at all levels create healthier, more effective project environments.
metadata._yoast_wpseo_metadesc: In this episode, I talk with Jenna Anderson about project management leadership, AEC project delivery, scope planning, and time management.
metadata._yoast_wpseo_opengraph-title: Effective Project Management Leadership Strategies for AEC Professionals
metadata._yoast_wpseo_opengraph-description: Strong project management leadership is the key to successful AEC project delivery. From using the right tools and setting clear scope and budgets to mastering time management, this episode dives into how project managers can grow with confidence while maintaining healthy boundaries for long-term success.
metadata._yoast_wpseo_twitter-title: Effective Project Management Leadership Strategies for AEC Professionals
metadata._yoast_wpseo_twitter-description: Strong Project Management Leadership keeps AEC projects on track. From tools & scope planning to time management & boundaries, learn how PMs can lead with confidence & avoid pitfalls.
